understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate the player to a specific gem tile marked '+' on each level within the step limit, while avoiding spike tiles that end the run. Each level provides 2 attempts with 50 turns each.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement uses directional commands (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, etc.) to traverse a grid. Gravity (DOWN/UP/LEFT/RIGHT) influences movement physics. CLICK removes specific clickable tiles from the board. Landing on spikes causes failure. Failed attempts restart the level with the failure appended to context.
